product.body_html:
Taking vitamin D without K2 is like flooding your house with calcium and leaving all the doors open — it ends up exactly where it shouldn't be.

Here's what most vitamin D supplements don't tell you: D3 increases calcium absorption from food dramatically. That's the point. But calcium has to go somewhere — and without vitamin K2 to direct it, studies show it deposits in arterial walls instead of bones. This is why some research has found that high-dose vitamin D supplementation without K2 can increase arterial calcification risk. K2 — specifically the MK-7 form, the most bioavailable and longest-lasting — activates two critical proteins: osteocalcin, which locks calcium into bone matrix, and Matrix GLA Protein, which actively removes calcium from arteries and soft tissue. Together, D3 and K2 form one of the most important cardiovascular and skeletal health combinations in nutritional science.

80% of the population is vitamin D deficient — most without knowing it. Low D3 is linked to suppressed immunity, poor mood, muscle weakness, bone loss, and increased infection susceptibility. Romira's raspberry gummies make this daily essential actually enjoyable to take. No pills, no swallowing — just a great-tasting gummy that delivers the exact synergistic combination your bones, arteries, and immune system need.

Key Benefits

  • ✓ D3 + K2 MK-7 — the complete, clinically proven combination
  • ✓ K2 directs calcium to bones, away from arteries
  • ✓ Reduces risk of arterial calcification from D3 supplementation alone
  • ✓ Supports bone density and prevents osteoporosis
  • ✓ Strengthens immune function — critical for year-round defence
  • ✓ Supports mood regulation and reduces winter fatigue
  • ✓ Raspberry gummy format — delicious, high compliance, no pills

Formulation

Vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol) paired with Vitamin K2 as MK-7 — the natural, long-acting form with the highest bioavailability. Delivered in a natural raspberry-flavoured gummy. No synthetic vitamin K1. No arterial calcification risk.

Who It's For

Anyone supplementing vitamin D who wants to do it safely and effectively — especially people with bone health concerns, cardiovascular risk factors, weak immunity, or low mood in winter months.

Don't take D3 without K2 — get the complete combination your bones and arteries actually need.
